summary: Comprehensive testing of new iteration 17 features: Category pages with module tests, homepage card navigation to /category/{catId}, module test quiz functionality, and enhanced learning path roadmap with progress line and pulse animations. All 28 frontend E2E tests passed across 2 new spec files. All 20 backend integration tests passed.
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 17 features verified working. New test suites created: category-module-tests.spec.ts (tests category page, module tests, quiz interaction) and learning-path-roadmap.spec.ts (tests enhanced roadmap with progress line, pulse animations). Key testids: home-card-{catId} (homepage cards), category-page, cat-back, cat-doc-{docId}, module-test, module-test-btn, module-test-expanded, lp-roadmap, lp-road-{i}, lp-step-{i}. Backend tests in test_iteration17_category_module_tests.py cover module-tests API, categories API, learning-paths API, path-tests API.

category_page_navigation.details: Homepage cards (data-testid='home-card-{catId}') navigate to /category/{catId}. Category page shows title, document count, numbered document list, and back button.

category_page_document_list.details: Document cards on category page show numbered items (1, 2, 3...), title, reading time, update date. Clicking navigates to document viewer.

module_test_functionality.details: Module test button (data-testid='module-test-btn') visible on category pages with tests. Expands to show quiz questions. User can select answers, submit, see score, and try again. Can minimize quiz.

module_tests_api.details: API endpoint /api/module-tests/{category_id} returns questions array for categories with tests. Returns empty array for categories without tests.

learning_path_roadmap.details: Roadmap (data-testid='lp-roadmap') shows numbered nodes for each step. Progress line (.lp-road-progress-line) fills as steps complete. Nodes have .completed class when done, .next-up class with pulse animation for current step.

learning_path_progress.details: Progress bar updates percentage as steps marked complete. Step cards show Start Reading and Mark Complete buttons. Completed steps show Mark Incomplete. 100% shows Start Again button and completion banner.

category_page_back_button.details: Back button (data-testid='cat-back') navigates from category page to homepage.

existing_features_regression.details: All 48 existing tests from previous iterations still pass. Document viewer, learning paths, tools, editor, sidebar navigation all working.

mocked_apis.authentication: MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh). All users treated as admin. No real Google OAuth flow.
